summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification completed for the 10 job candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard is non-canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked, several open PRs still need real behavior proof or maintainer/product judgment, and security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
